description: Retire temporary frontend/content hardcoding and bridge logic after the v2 Korean reference/runtime surfaces became usable.

tasks.title: Inventory current hardcoded bridges and accepted temporary behavior
tasks.notes: Captured video locale fallback, Learning Library legacy i18n bridge, sync alias exclusions, shared_bank UI semantics, mapping_v2 placement, and localized dictionary core leakage.

tasks.title: Add manifest-driven supported-locale resolution
tasks.notes: Frontend slice completed in lingo-frontend-web: PipelineManifest now infers supported locales from dictionary/video/Learning Library manifests; dictionary, video, and Learning Library resolve content locale through manifest data instead of Korean-only hardcoded fallback. English UI chrome asset remains the fallback UI locale, with BOM-safe parsing.

tasks.title: Add asset integrity gates for stale layout and empty i18n regressions
tasks.notes: Gate no per-word dictionary runtime files, no Learning Library *_index aliases except sources_index, and no large drop in sentence/video i18n coverage.

tasks.title: Move shared_bank semantics into Learning Library artifact metadata
tasks.notes: Artifact should expose source/source-group metadata and localized label for shared example banks. Frontend should stop hardcoding Example Bank semantics.

tasks.title: Brief dictionary resolver package placement
tasks.notes: Decide whether mapping_v2 and origin resolver data live in a core resolver module, bridge module, or separate dictionary resolver package. Do not remove mapping_v2 before Phase 3 validation.

tasks.title: Prepare dictionary strict core/i18n split plan
tasks.notes: Plan migration so dictionary_core.json stops carrying localized zh_tw definitions/translations once i18n pack coverage and resolver placement are gated.

tasks.title: Retire Learning Library legacy i18n bridge after canonical v2 sidecars exist
tasks.blocker: content_v2 inventory must emit canonical i18n sidecars keyed by source_id, turn_id, and sentence_id.
tasks.notes: Current legacy bridge is acceptable until canonical v2 i18n sidecars are emitted and coverage tests pass.

tasks.title: Define and enforce source-of-truth lookup policy
tasks.notes: Defines runtime truth tables, legacy quarantine rules, agent lookup order, and gate recommendations to prevent frontend work from accidentally attaching to old data or old schemas.

tasks.title: Add versioned content contract registry and Learning Library runtime validator
tasks.notes: Adds learning_library.package.v1 and manifest.package.v1 schemas plus an executable standard-library validator for runtime manifest shape, deprecated alias rejection, referenced-file existence, locale presence, and sentence i18n baseline coverage.

tasks.title: Split display POS from backend POS composition in atom/runtime DTOs
tasks.notes: Current LingoAtom.pos can carry either displayable POS or backend validation composition such as adj+e+e/v+e. Short-term frontend may filter technical values, but the contract should split learner-facing display_pos_key/pos from backend-only composition/debug_pos_composition. No schema implementation in this slice; first deliver a migration brief and validator expectation.

tasks.title: Neutralize Learning Library frontend field names for multilingual content
tasks.notes: Pre-launch direct cleanup: Learning Library domain models, DTOs, mapper, reference UI, seed fixtures, and tests now use surface/translation/title/summary instead of surfaceKo/translationZhTw/titleZhTw/summaryZhTw. Deprecated field names are intentionally not supported as runtime fallbacks.
